mapper.select: SELECT * FROM employees WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE employees SET department = #{departmentName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
